name: Petroleum Technology Development Fund (PTDF)
partnership_notes: Funds overseas MSc/PhD in energy-related fields; align with UNIC Energy/AI/Engineering masters and offer info-sessions tailored to PTDF awardees.

name: Niger Delta Development Commission (NDDC) Foreign Postgraduate Scholarship
partnership_notes: Targets Niger Delta indigenes for foreign MSc/PhD in priority STEM fields; propose UNIC Energy/Maritime/Health programs plus regional workshops with state liaison offices.

name: Nigeria LNG (NLNG) Postgraduate Scholarship
partnership_notes: Awards UK-taught master's scholarships (~15 annually) in engineering/energy disciplines; pitch UNIC as cost-effective EU alternative and offer co-branded preparatory webinars.

name: Nigeria Higher Education Foundation (NHEF) Scholars Program
partnership_notes: Runs career accelerator/internships for partner universities (UNILAG, UI, UNN, ABU, KUST); potential feeder for graduate study abroad with GRE/IELTS prep and scholarship coaching under UNIC banner.

name: Junior Achievement Nigeria (JAN)
partnership_notes: Delivers Company Program, LEAD Camp, and Venture in Management Program with Lagos Business School; sponsor leadership tracks and scholarship awareness for students eyeing EU study.
